testcase.name: testBasePriceGreaterThanOrEqualToSellingPrice

failure.message: Base price (65.0) must be >= selling price (5525.0) expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.name: testDiscountBadgeMatchesCalculation

failure.message: Discount badge (15.0%) does not match calculated (-8400.0%). base=65.0 selling=5525.0 expected [true] but found [false]
